description: The function enforces a time-based email quota based on the given parameters.
The function denies sending emails when the number of recent emails exceeds the specified limit.
The function allows sending emails when the number of recent emails is within the specified limit.
The function uses list comprehension to filter recent emails based on a cutoff time.
The function returns False when the number of recent emails exceeds the specified limit.
The function returns True when the number of recent emails is within the specified limit.
The function uses the len() function to determine the length of a list.
